title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code to achieve rapid scaling from $1B to $19B valuation. The strategies include automating existing workflows, unlocking sub-threshold work, building specialized tools, and using AI as a thought partner, with a focus on avoiding the common pitfall of AI becoming additional work rather than leverage.
